name: Lemon Tea Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the sugar into the melted butter.
2. Beat in the eggs.
3. Stir in the flour and salt until just blended.
4. Add 3/4 cup of lemon juice and one tablespoon of lemon zest.
5. Pour the batter into a greased and floured loaf pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 50 minutes.
7. Remove from the oven and cool for ten minutes.
8. Mix the powdered sugar with the remaining 1/4 cup of lemon juice and one tablespoon of lemon zest.
9. Remove the bread from the pan and pour the glaze over the top.
